race.comment: GUARD THE MULLAH (4) was too good from the back here fresh before finding metropolitan grade too strong last time out. Back to this grade looks a good move and Nottle's claim comes in handy. Likely to get back from the draw but can storm home from the back of the pack. CALL TIME (7) won well here over 1300m two back before finding the going a touch sharp over the 1100m last time out. Back out to 1200m is a big tick and Faithfull replaces the apprentice hoop. Can sit handier this time and can make her presence felt. FAVAIOS (1) finished 1.7L off the winner last time out, beating home CALL TIME in the process. This looks to shape similarly and he boasts a good record at this track and trip. Can go one better without surprising. SWIFT STREAKER (3) is better than he showed last time out and can feature coming back in trip. THREE AY EM (2) can go on with the job following his maiden win last time out.
